# nerdctl_network (Data Source)

An existing CNI network, e.g. the default `bridge`. Fails when absent. The driver is not reported by `network inspect`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nerdctl_network" "bridge" {
  name = "bridge"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Network name.

### Read-Only

- `gateway` (String) Gateway address within `subnet`.
- `id` (String) Network ID as reported by `nerdctl network inspect`.
- `labels` (Map of String) User labels on the network (nerdctl bookkeeping labels are filtered out).
- `subnet` (String) Subnet in CIDR notation.
